title: Zeitgebers, Time Judgments, and VR Immersion: A Constructive Replication Study
author: Aliya Andrich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the digital appendix of the article "Zeitgebers, Time Judgments, and VR Immersion: A Constructive 
Replication Study": 

 
	 Preprint 
	 Unity application (5.6.1): Experiment_final.zip 
	 Build version: "Executable.zip" 
	 Analysis_and_data
	 
		 README_dataset.md 
		 raw_time_productions_and_workload_performance.csv 
		 Analysis scripts: statistical_analysis.R 
	 
	 
	 demographics_questionnaire 
	 SupportingFigures-Procedure: study protocol, application protocol, factorial design 
	 SupportingFigures-Workload: example figures of the workload task
